title: Hermes Multilevel Skills Hero
brief: A clean editorial illustration visualizing agent skills organization as a filing system transformation. Left side shows a messy flat pile of folders with long hyphenated labels floating in disorder. Right side shows an organized nested folder tree with labeled categories: official, 3rd, project, personal, team. A subtle arrow or flowing line connects the chaos to order. Modern tech aesthetic, soft professional colors, minimal text, suitable as article hero/cover.
